description: GitButler hooks configuration for L1 TRACEABILITY and constitutional law enforcement

pre-commit.description: Enforces L1 TRACEABILITY - all commits must reference an issue

pre-push.description: Warns about L4 TESTABILITY - .t27 files need test/invariant/bench

commitMessage.prompt:
Generate a commit message for t27 Trinity S³AI following these rules:
1. Format: type(scope): description
2. Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore
3. MUST include: 'Closes #N' for issue tracking (L1 TRACEABILITY)
4. Reference relevant Invariant Laws if applicable (L1-L7)
5. ASCII-only, English identifiers (L3 PURITY)
6. If modifying .t27 specs, mention the spec file path

Example:
feat(compiler): Add algorithm codegen placeholder

This adds placeholder support for algorithm code generation
in the compiler frontend, enabling future work on
optimization passes.

Closes #42

L2 GENERATION: gen/ files are generated from specs

phiLoop.description: PHI LOOP stacked branches for ring development

L2_GENERATION.name: GENERATION
L2_GENERATION.description: Files under gen/ are generated; edit specs instead

L3_PURITY.name: PURITY
L3_PURITY.description: Source files must be ASCII-only with English identifiers

L7_UNITY.name: UNITY
L7_UNITY.description: No new *.sh on critical path; use tri/t27c
